name: Loulis Mills S.A.
summary: Loulis Mills S.A. produces and trades in flour products in Greece, Cyprus, and Bulgaria. The company operates in three segments: Professional Flour Mill Products, Consumer products & Bakery and Pastry Mixtures, and Mixtures & Raw Material for Bakery & Pastry. It offers flour, semolina, and flour by-products to food industries, bakers, and breeders for professional use; consumer products of flour mill, and bakery and pastry mixtures for bakery and pastry; and mixtures and raw materials for bakery and pastry. The company was formerly known as Kylindromylos Loulis S.A. and changed its name to Loulis Mills S.A. in 2001. Loulis Mills S.A. was founded in 1782 and is headquartered in Almyros, Greece.
